name: KAIRO
motive: Telekinesis / Remote Matter Movement: Gesture-driven matter manipulation without physical contact by influencing objects remotely using combined technologies and invisible force interactions.
priority_reason: Enables remote gestural interaction and physical motion translation.
next_build: Build Leap Motion near-infrared hand-tracking array, gesture recognition neural net, electromagnetic coil field gradients, and acoustic levitation standing wave array.
integration_role: Kattappa AI OS coordinates gesture signals and triggers remote physical actuators.
safety_boundary: No high-voltage coil activation or unsafe levitation steps without physical feedback and current safety limits.
